data.title: Oricell Therapeutics raised US$70M in financing to advance solid tumor CAR-T therapies globally.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, Oricell Therapeutics Holdings Limited, a prominent company in cancer immunotherapy based in Shanghai and San Francisco, completed a Series C1 financing round, raising $70 million. The financing was co-led by Beijing Medical and Health, signifying a significant milestone for the company in advancing its innovative treatments for cancer.

data.title: Top Federal Reserve official hints no immediate rate cuts despite pressure from Trump. Rates may stay steady at upcoming meeting.
data.description: It is anticipated that the Federal Reserve will maintain the current interest rates during its upcoming meeting at the end of the month, which may potentially fuel friction with President Trump.

data.title: AI is helping UK airports manage disruption as passenger numbers rise, with major hubs like Heathrow operating close to pre-pandemic levels.
data.description: In LUTON, England, Artificial intelligence is becoming more integral in the management of disruptions at UK airports due to the escalating number of passengers. According to Civil Aviation Authority (CAA) figures, prominent airports such as Heathrow, Gatwick, and Luton are operating at levels similar to before the pandemic, intensifying the demand for effective flight scheduling and ground transportation. Analysts in the industry note that AI is now commonly employed to forecast delays, monitor incoming flights, and organize connecting flights, especially...
